tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation:
So'zlashuv ingliz tilida _have to_ so'zi _must_ dan ko'ra keng qo'llaniladi. _Must_ ko'pincha yozma e'lonlar va ko'rsatmalarda ishlatiladi.
✓ _'We **have to** pay the phone bill today,' Rita said._
✓ _Passengers **must** turn off all mobile phones._
tip.translation_ru:
В разговорном английском _have to_ употребляется чаще, чем _must_. _Must_ часто используется в письменных объявлениях и инструкциях.
✓ _'We **have to** pay the phone bill today,' Rita said._
✓ _Passengers **must** turn off all mobile phones._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
_Mustn't_ va _don't have to_ bir xil ma'noni anglatmaydi.
✓ _You **mustn't** do that!_ ( = Buni qilma!)
✓ _You **don't have to** do that._ ( = Xohlasang qilishing mumkin, lekin bu shart emas.)
tip.translation_ru:
_Mustn't_ и _don't have to_ не означают одно и то же.
✓ _You **mustn't** do that!_ ( = Не делай этого!)
✓ _You **don't have to** do that._ ( = Ты можешь это сделать, если хочешь, но это не обязательно.)

cells:
_The phone is ringing – it **must** be Simon._
_This letter **can't/couldn't** be from Japan because it's got a French stamp._
cells_uz:
_The phone is ringing – it **must** be Simon._
_This letter **can't/couldn't** be from Japan because it's got a French stamp._
cells_ru:
_The phone is ringing – it **must** be Simon._
_This letter **can't/couldn't** be from Japan because it's got a French stamp._

cells: _We **ought to/should** hear from Cheryl this weekend._
cells_uz: _We **ought to/should** hear from Cheryl this weekend._
cells_ru: _We **ought to/should** hear from Cheryl this weekend._

cells: _I'm not sure what language it is – it **could/may/might** be Polish._
cells_uz: _I'm not sure what language it is – it **could/may/might** be Polish._
cells_ru: _I'm not sure what language it is – it **could/may/might** be Polish._

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation:
Biror narsa haqida bizda dalil bo'lsa, ehtimolni ifodalash uchun ko'pincha _must_, _can't_ va _couldn't_ ishlatamiz.
✓ _I just rang Paul, but there's no answer. He **must** be out._
tip.translation_ru:
Мы часто используем _must_, _can't_ и _couldn't_ для выражения вероятности, когда у нас есть какие-то доказательства.
✓ _I just rang Paul, but there's no answer. He **must** be out._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation: O'tgan zamondagi imkoniyat va ehtimol haqida gapirish uchun modal fe'l + perfect infinitive ishlatamiz. 22-birlikka qarang.
tip.translation_ru: Для обозначения возможности и вероятности в прошедшем времени мы используем модальный глагол + перфектный инфинитив. См. Unit 22.
